vs_past.B47_delta_note: Scenario file has only 3 scenarios vs 7 stated in worker prompt; 4 blocked for missing scenario definitions. Of 3 runnable: V=2 (+0 vs B46 proportionally), R=1 (S3 plan_invalid JSON error)

scenarios.notes: LLM generated malformed JSON in steps_json argument; plan validation rejected it; router completed the turn with empty reply text. No retry_injected because this is a tool-error path, not an empty-stop path.
Scenario 4 not defined in plan_mode.yaml (file has only 3 scenarios; worker prompt stated 7)

new_findings.title: S3 plan_invalid JSON: malformed steps_json kills plan before lifecycle fires
new_findings.description: In plan_summary_across_n_files, the LLM generated a steps_json string with a JSON syntax error at char 473 (missing comma). The plan tool rejected it with plan_invalid, no plan lifecycle events fired (plan_emitted=0), and the chat turn completed with an empty text reply. REYN_EMPTY_STOP_RETRY=1 did NOT trigger because this is a tool-error path (plan returns status=error), not an empty-stop path. The LLM did not retry or fallback to non-plan answer.
new_findings.hypothesis: Flash-lite model truncates or mangles long steps_json strings when the plan has many steps or long descriptions. Needs replay with patch to confirm.

new_findings.title: retry_injected active in S1 (2x) and S2 (1x) — PR #287 evidence
new_findings.description: router_empty_response_retry_injected fired 2 times in S1 (plan_compare_two_concepts) and 1 time in S2 (plan_explain_with_code_references). Both scenarios still reached V verdict despite retries, confirming the retry mechanism is functional. Total retry_injected across worker-6 runnable scenarios: 3. This contributes to PR #287 default-flip evidence accumulation.

new_findings.title: control_ir_failed 2x in S1 — possible file-read permission issue inside plan steps
new_findings.description: S1 produced control_ir_failed=2 events. Despite this, plan_step_completed=3 and plan_aggregated=1, so the plan recovered. The control_ir_failed likely corresponds to file read ops inside plan steps hitting permission gates. Not blocking for this verdict but warrants investigation for a future batch.

new_findings.title: Scenario count mismatch: plan_mode.yaml has 3 scenarios, worker prompt states 7
new_findings.description: Worker-W6 prompt specified 7 scenarios to run but plan_mode.yaml contains only 3 scenarios. Scenarios 4-7 could not run (blocked). This is a worker-prompt vs scenario-file consistency gap. Main agent should reconcile before next batch.
